name: @aily-project/board-arduino_nano_esp32
description: The Arduino Nano ESP32 is based on the ESP32-S3 (Xtensa LX7 dual-core at 240 MHz) in the compact Nano form factor, featuring Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n and Bluetooth 5.0 LE connectivity, 8 MB Flash, 512 KB SRAM, up to 16 MB PSRAM, 14 digital I/O pins, 8 analog inputs, and USB-C. It is fully supported by the Arduino ecosystem and MicroPython.
